decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id entity_mta-nyct already matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct exactly. The observation was extracted from a 2010 presentation source that is already attributed to this canonical record. The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so this is new (the observation already resolves to that id).

Both records represent Brooklyn Community Board 1. Observation has entity_name 'Community Board 1' with description 'Brooklyn Community Board 1', while target registry record has entity_name 'Brooklyn Community Board 1'. Same entity_type (community_board/community board), same borough, same board number. The observation's base_record_id (entity_community-board-1-brooklyn) and the target (entity_brooklyn-community-board-1) are different record IDs referring to the same real-world community board.
